questions.question: What actor replaced Charlie Sheen in the TV show Two and a Half Men?
What popular book series used the phrase "Zoo-Wee Mama!"?
questions.answer: Diary of a Wimpy Kid (by Jeff Kinney)

questions.question: Finish the lyric: "The story of my life, I take her home, ___".
questions.answer: "I drive all night to keep her warm"

questions.question: Why was Harambe, a gorilla, shot and killed at the Cincinnati Zoo?
questions.answer: A 3-yr old boy fell into the enclosure and workers were afraid for his safety.

questions.question: What name was given for an old worn-out jacket worn to a frat party because it might end up dirty or stolen by the end of the night?
